div.p: The transmitter must maintain the following relationship: OfferedWindow = SND.WND UsedWindow = SND.NXT - SND.UNA UsableWindow = OfferedWindow - UsedWindow

ul.li: SND_UNA: Pointer to first byte of In-Flight sequence
SND_NXT: Pointer to first byte of Usable sequence
Window End: Pointer to first byte of Future sequence

g.title: Data confirmed by receiver via cumulative ACK
Sent but not yet acknowledged (SND.NXT - SND.UNA)
Inside window but not yet sent

ul.li: Constraint: SND_NXT cannot exceed SND_UNA + SND_WND

g.title: Data confirmed by receiver via cumulative ACK
Sent but not yet acknowledged (SND.NXT - SND.UNA)
Inside window but not yet sent
